inputs.label: Target Breathing Rate
inputs.businessContext: Desired breathing cycles per minute (typically 5-6 for coherence)

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired breathing cycles per minute (typically 5-6 for coherence)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dakikada istenen solunum döngüsü sayısı (tipik olarak 5-6, uyum için)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Atemzyklen pro Minute (typischerweise 5-6 für Kohärenz)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Cycles respiratoires souhaités par minute (généralement 5-6 pour la cohérence)
businessContext_i18n.es: Ciclos respiratorios deseados por minuto (típicamente 5-6 para coherencia)
businessContext_i18n.ar: دورات التنفس المرغوبة في الدقيقة (عادة 5-6 للتماسك)

inputs.label: Inhale/Exhale Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of inhale duration to exhale duration (e.g., 0.5 means inhale is half of exhale)

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of inhale duration to exhale duration (e.g., 0.5 means inhale is half of exhale)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nefes alma süresinin nefes verme süresine oranı (örneğin, 0,5 nefes almanın nefes vermenin yarısı olduğu anlamına gelir)
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis der Einatmungsdauer zur Ausatmungsdauer (z. B. 0,5 bedeutet Einatmung ist halb so lang wie Ausatmung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ratio de la durée d'inspiration sur la durée d'expiration (ex. 0,5 signifie que l'inspiration dure moitié moins que l'expiration)
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación entre la duración de la inhalación y la exhalación (ej., 0.5 significa que la inhalación es la mitad de la exhalación)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة مدة الشهيق إلى مدة الزفير (مثلاً 0.5 تعني أن الشهيق نصف الزفير)

inputs.label: Practice Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of the practice session

businessContext_i18n.en: Total duration of the practice session
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale de la séance de pratique
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración total de la sesión de práctica

inputs.label: Resting Breathing Rate
inputs.businessContext: Your typical resting breathing rate for comparison

businessContext_i18n.en: Your typical resting breathing rate for comparison
businessContext_i18n.tr: Karşılaştırma için tipik dinlenme solunum hızınız
businessContext_i18n.fr: Votre fréquence respiratoire typique au repos pour comparaison
businessContext_i18n.es: Su frecuencia respiratoria típica en reposo para comparación
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل التنفس النموذجي أثناء الراحة للمقارنة

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
